race.comment: PLEASE MIZTER (2) comes through a good race last start where he faded out of contention and finished 3L off the winner. Out to 1400m now third-up looks ideal and he's shown sharp improvement third-up in the past. Ticks plenty of boxes now and can return to winning ways. DONT WAIT FOR LUCK (1) got back and closed off nicely over 1200m at this track and steps out to a more suitable distance now. Cooper's claim comes in handy and it wouldn't surprise to see him settle up front from the inside alley. Can put his best foot forward. HIGH PRECISION (7) flew home first-up over the 1300m journey, picking up in strong order. She can go on with the job now with Riordan in the saddle. Likely to be back in the run but watch for her flying late. CAPTAIN ROGERS (8) finished off strongly last time out and can continue to build into his campaign. MONTY ZOOMER (6) was strong here fresh and can be in the finish again out in trip.
